sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current arrangement
current_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
pos = {}
for n in current_nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        pos[n['color']] = (cr, cc)
print("Current arrangement:")
print(pos)
print()
# Map to slots
slots = {
    'red1': (22, 22),
    'red2': (22, 28),
    'red3': (22, 40),
    'green1': (36, 22),
    'green2': (36, 28),
    'green3': (36, 34),
    'green4': (36, 40),
}
print("Slot contents:")
for name, (sr, sc) in slots.items():
    for color, (cr, cc) in pos.items():
        if abs(cr - sr) < 2 and abs(cc - sc) < 2:
            print(f"  {name}: {color}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
